description: Complete DNA profile for every Windy Pro model. Single source of truth.

models.name: Windy STT Lite
models.notes: ⚠️ High eval loss (4.180) for its size class — Concorde spelling divergence detected. LoRA may have introduced regression artifact. RECOMMENDATION: Investigate Concorde spelling issue, retrain with larger/cleaner dataset. A whisper-base model should achieve eval loss < 2.0.

models.name: Windy STT Edge
models.notes: ⚠️ High eval loss (4.814) — ROOT CAUSE: English-only LoRA (LibriSpeech) applied to multilingual model (whisper-large-v2). The LoRA likely degrades multilingual performance rather than helping. RECOMMENDATION: Retrain with multilingual dataset (Common Voice, VoxPopuli) or remove LoRA and apply multilingual-aware fine-tuning. Base model is strong — it works despite the LoRA, not because of it.

models.name: Windy STT Lite (CPU)
models.notes: INT8 quantized from windy-stt-lite. ⚠️ Inherits high eval loss (4.180) and Concorde spelling divergence from parent. See windy-stt-lite notes.

models.name: Windy STT Edge (CPU)
models.notes: INT8 quantized from windy-stt-edge. ⚠️ Inherits high eval loss (4.814) from parent — English LoRA on multilingual model mismatch. See windy-stt-edge notes for root cause and retraining recommendation.

last_updated_by: Kit 0C3 Charlie — added root cause analysis for Edge and Lite eval loss issues
